mapper.select:
SELECT m.mate_id as mateId, m.member_id as memberId, m.region_id as regionId, m.trip_id as tripId, m.target_count as targetCount, TO_CHAR(m.start_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') as startDate, TO_CHAR(m.end_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') as endDate, m.title, m.content, m.tags, m.status, m.view_count as viewCount, TO_CHAR(m.created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') as createdAt, u.nickname, u.profile_image as profilePhoto, r.sido_name as sidoName FROM travel_mate m JOIN member2 u ON m.member_id = u.member_id JOIN region r ON m.region_id = r.region_id WHERE 1=1
AND m.region_id = #{regionId}
AND m.start_date <= TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND m.end_date >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND m.tags LIKE '%' || #{searchTag} || '%'
ORDER BY m.status DESC, m.created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO travel_mate ( mate_id, member_id, region_id, trip_id, target_count, start_date, end_date, title, content, tags ) VALUES ( SEQ_TRAVEL_MATE_ID.NEXTVAL, #{memberId}, #{regionId}, #{tripId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{targetCount}, TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), #{title}, #{content}, #{tags} )
mapper.select: SELECT m.*, u.nickname, u.profile_image as profilePhoto, r.sido_name as sidoName FROM travel_mate m JOIN member2 u ON m.member_id = u.member_id JOIN region r ON m.region_id = r.region_id WHERE m.mate_id = #{mateId}
